title: Visible Tops
description: Visible Tops - resources pack. He will use Optifine to highlight all ores, suspicious sand and gravel (including "default" ores and ores added by various mods) with such bright lighting that they can be seen from afar.
body: Visible Tops - illuminated ores. This resource pack will make life easier for any player, especially beginners. He will use Optifine to highlight all ores, suspicious sand and gravel (including "default" ores and ores added by various mods) with such bright lighting that they can be seen from a distance, so far away that in any cave you can immediately notice the necessary ores and easily extract them without unnecessary effort.
